category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Cameroon market under ANOR conformity assessment.

title.en: China-to-Cameroon LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入喀麦隆：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入喀麥隆：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Cameroon ANOR (Agence des Normes et de la Qualite) conformity assessment, NC/IEC 60598, IEC 62560 and IEC 62471 adopted standards, mandatory import inspection, energy programmes, ART radio approval for smart lighting, and French-language documentation requirements versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与喀麦隆 ANOR（标准与质量署）合格评定、采用的 NC/IEC 60598、IEC 62560 及 IEC 62471 标准、强制进口检验、能效计划、智能照明 ART 无线电核准及法语文件要求差距对照，与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與喀麥隆 ANOR（標準與質量署）合格評定、採用的 NC/IEC 60598、IEC 62560 及 IEC 62471 標準、強制進口檢驗、能效計劃、智能照明 ART 無線電核准及法語文件要求差距對照，與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Cameroon law, ANOR conformity assessment programme requirements, adopted Norme Camerounaise (NC) and IEC standards, import inspection procedures, ART radio approval rules, and French-language documentation obligations with qualified professionals and the appointed in-country importer before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定认定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士及指定的在地进口商核验现行喀麦隆法律、ANOR 合格评定计划要求、采用的喀麦隆标准（NC）及 IEC 标准、进口检验程序、ART 无线电核准规则及法语文件义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定認定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士及指定的在地進口商核驗現行喀麥隆法律、ANOR 合格評定計劃要求、採用的喀麥隆標準（NC）及 IEC 標準、進口檢驗程序、ART 無線電核准規則及法語文件義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Cameroon must obtain ANOR (Agence des Normes et de la Qualite) conformity assessment for regulated products, with mandatory pre-shipment / import inspection under the Cameroon conformity programme; demonstrate electrical safety against NC/IEC 60598-1 (luminaires) and IEC 62560 (self-ballasted LED lamps) plus IEC 61347-2-13 for LED control gear; address photobiological safety via IEC 62471 where adopted as an NC; meet any applicable Cameroon energy-efficiency / energy-label programme requirement for lighting (an energy programme exists but is far less prescriptive than the EU Ecodesign / EPREL regime); obtain ART (Agence de Regulation des Telecommunications) radio type approval for smart/wireless luminaires; supply French-language documentation, marking and instructions; and appoint an in-country importer for customs clearance at Douala or Kribi. Cameroon adopts IEC standards as Normes Camerounaises rather than running an EU-style horizontal Ecodesign, RoHS, or REACH regime — there is no horizontal RoHS substance-restriction law in Cameroon comparable to EU RoHS, and no REACH-equivalent SVHC notification duty. Existing Chinese CCC certification does not substitute for ANOR conformity assessment.
answer_first.zh: 向喀麦隆出口的中国 LED 灯具制造商须：为受管制产品取得 ANOR（标准与质量署）合格评定，并依据喀麦隆合格评定计划接受强制装运前/进口检验；依据 NC/IEC 60598-1（灯具）及 IEC 62560（自镇流 LED 灯）证明电气安全，LED 控制装置还须符合 IEC 61347-2-13；在 IEC 62471 被采用为 NC 时据此处理光生物安全；满足适用的喀麦隆照明能效/能效标识计划要求（该国存在能效计划，但远不如欧盟生态设计/EPREL 制度具约束性）；为智能/无线灯具取得 ART（电信监管署）无线电型号核准；提供法语文件、标识及说明；并指定在地进口商在杜阿拉或克里比口岸办理清关。喀麦隆将 IEC 标准采用为喀麦隆标准（NC），而非实行欧盟式横向生态设计、RoHS 或 REACH 制度——喀麦隆没有可与欧盟 RoHS 相比的横向 RoHS 物质限制法律，也没有 REACH 等效的 SVHC 通报义务。现有中国 CCC 认证不可替代 ANOR 合格评定。
answer_first.zht: 向喀麥隆出口的中國 LED 燈具製造商須：為受管制產品取得 ANOR（標準與質量署）合格評定，並依據喀麥隆合格評定計劃接受強制裝運前/進口檢驗；依據 NC/IEC 60598-1（燈具）及 IEC 62560（自鎮流 LED 燈）證明電氣安全，LED 控制裝置還須符合 IEC 61347-2-13；在 IEC 62471 被採用為 NC 時據此處理光生物安全；滿足適用的喀麥隆照明能效/能效標識計劃要求（該國存在能效計劃，但遠不如歐盟生態設計/EPREL 制度具約束性）；為智能/無線燈具取得 ART（電信監管署）無線電型號核准；提供法語文件、標識及說明；並指定在地進口商在杜阿拉或克里比口岸辦理清關。喀麥隆將 IEC 標準採用為喀麥隆標準（NC），而非實行歐盟式橫向生態設計、RoHS 或 REACH 制度——喀麥隆沒有可與歐盟 RoHS 相比的橫向 RoHS 物質限制法律，也沒有 REACH 等效的 SVHC 通報義務。現有中國 CCC 認證不可替代 ANOR 合格評定。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. ANOR adopted-standard references (NC/IEC editions), the Cameroon conformity assessment / import inspection programme scope, ART radio approval rules, and any energy-efficiency programme thresholds must be re-verified against current ANOR and ART publications on each review cycle. Where Cameroon lacks an EU-style horizontal regime (RoHS, REACH/SVHC), rows must state so plainly rather than implying an equivalent obligation.
